tasks.subject: Task 1: Proto messages + Rust generation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Define app tool messages, Envelope tags 35/36/37, Rust roundtrip tests.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["proto/ahand/v1/app_tool.proto", "proto/ahand/v1/envelope.proto", "crates/ahand-protocol/build.rs", "crates/ahand-protocol/tests/app_tool_roundtrip.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-protocol && cargo check --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["roundtrip tests pass", "workspace compiles", "tag 32 untouched"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: TypeScript proto generation + exports + changelog
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Regenerate @ahandai/proto with app tool types, version 0.3.0.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/proto-ts/src/index.ts", "packages/proto-ts/package.json", "packages/proto-ts/CHANGELOG.md"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @ahandai/proto build && pnpm --filter @ahandai/proto lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AppTool* types importable from package root", "build+lint pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: ahandd app_tool_registry core module
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Registry with validation, snapshot/revision watch, fail-fast permits, completed-call cache; unit-tested.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/app_tool_registry/mod.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/lib.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd app_tool_registry", "acceptanceCriteria": ["name regex + schema-object validation", "revision bump + watch notify on mutation", "clamp_timeout [1000,300000] default 60000", "4-permit fail-fast semaphore", "bounded completed cache"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: ahandd DaemonHandle API + snapshot advertising
tasks.description:
**Goal:** register_app_tool/unregister_app_tool on DaemonHandle; AppToolsUpdate pushed on change and re-sent after every Hello.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/public_api.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/ahand_client.rs", "crates/ahandd/src/main.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/app_tools.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/mock_hub/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd --test app_tools && cargo check --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["snapshot after Hello", "snapshot on register/unregister", "snapshot re-sent after reconnect", "CLI daemon still builds"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: ahandd AppToolRequest dispatch + isolated execution
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Idempotency, lookup, INVALID_ARGS, clamped timeout, panic isolation, fail-fast concurrency, AppToolResponse.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/ahand_client.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/app_tools.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/mock_hub/mod.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd --test app_tools", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy path", "TOOL_NOT_FOUND", "INVALID_ARGS", "EXECUTION_TIMEOUT", "HANDLER_PANIC daemon survives", "CONCURRENCY_LIMIT on 5th call", "idempotent replay returns cached response"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: ahandd session-mode gating + tighten-only requires_approval
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Synthetic JobRequest rides SessionManager::check + ApprovalManager::submit; tighten-only escalation in TRUST/AUTO_ACCEPT.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahandd/src/ahand_client.rs", "crates/ahandd/tests/app_tools.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahandd --test app_tools && cargo check --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["INACTIVE -> SESSION_INACTIVE", "STRICT -> approve/deny/timeout paths", "TRUST+AUTO_ACCEPT pass without flag", "requires_approval forces approval in all modes", "ApprovalRequest carries job_id=tool_call_id tool=app:{name}"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: hub catalog store + inbound AppToolsUpdate
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Redis-backed per-device catalog with explicit stale flag; gateway arm with revision ordering; audit on accepted update.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-hub-store/src/app_tool_store.rs", "crates/ahand-hub-store/src/lib.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/state.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/ws/device_gateway.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/tests/app_tool_catalog.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-hub-store && cargo test -p ahand-hub && cargo check --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["wholesale replace + stale clear", "revision ordering with stale exception", "stale on disconnect", "audit device.app_tools.updated"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: hub catalog read endpoint + webhook event
tasks.description:
**Goal:** GET /api/devices/{id}/app-tools (JWT, camelCase, stale ORed with presence) + device.app_tools.updated webhook.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-hub/src/http/control_plane.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/webhook/mod.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/ws/device_gateway.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/tests/app_tool_catalog.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-hub && cargo check --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["endpoint returns revision/stale/tools", "404 unknown device", "webhook enqueued on accept, not on duplicate"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: hub POST /api/control/app-tool invocation
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Oneshot pending-map invoke service (browser pattern), offline fast-fail, timeout, full-outcome audit.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["crates/ahand-hub/src/app_tool_service.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/lib.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/state.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/http/control_plane.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/src/ws/device_gateway.rs", "crates/ahand-hub/tests/app_tool_invoke.rs"], "verifyCommand": "cargo test -p ahand-hub --test app_tool_invoke && cargo check --workspace", "acceptanceCriteria": ["happy path 200 result", "daemon errors in 200 body", "409 DEVICE_OFFLINE fast-fail", "404 unknown", "504 timeout + pending cleanup", "audit app_tool.invoked all outcomes"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 10: SDK listAppTools + invokeAppTool
tasks.description:
**Goal:** CloudClient methods with established auth/error/abort conventions; sdk+proto 0.3.0 lockstep.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["packages/sdk/src/cloud-client.ts", "packages/sdk/src/index.ts", "packages/sdk/package.json", "packages/sdk/CHANGELOG.md", "packages/sdk/src/cloud-client.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "pnpm --filter @ahandai/sdk test && pnpm --filter @ahandai/sdk lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["listAppTools returns catalog", "invokeAppTool throws app_tool_error with daemon code", "409->device_offline 504->timeout", "AbortSignal honored"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 11: docs, roadmap, full validation sweep
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Roadmap/README updated; full CI-equivalent validation green; new modules at 100% line coverage.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["docs/remote-control-roadmap.md", "README.md"], "verifyCommand": "cargo fmt --all -- --check && cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets --all-features -- -D warnings && cargo test --workspace --all-targets", "acceptanceCriteria": ["roadmap records app tools", "coverage thresholds met", "all TS builds/tests/lints pass"]}
```
